narrative:
Precinct Walnut Creek Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 1,207 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 2.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.8 percentage points.
